REQUIREMENT: Check if cnt_reg does not increment when timer is set to DISABLED
NOTES: Verified by the directed disabled_t_test and by the scoreboard against the golden model.

REQUIREMENT: Check AUTO_RESTART mode: interrupt is generated and cnt_reg is restarted from zero
NOTES: Verified by autorestart_t_test; the basic AUTO_RESTART scenario is also covered by timer_t_test.

REQUIREMENT: Check ONE_SHOT mode: interrupt is generated, cnt_reg is restarted and timer disables itself
NOTES: Verified by oneshot_t_test and checked by the scoreboard.

REQUIREMENT: Check CONTINOUS mode: interrupt is generated and cnt_reg continues running
NOTES: Verified by continuous_t_test; mode_transition_t_test also exercises the CONTINOUS mode.

REQUIREMENT: Check mode transitions between DISABLED, AUTO_RESTART, ONE_SHOT and CONTINOUS
NOTES: Mode transitions are targeted by the coverage-oriented sequences in full_cov_t_test.

REQUIREMENT: Check that IRQ can be generated in all active modes
NOTES: timer_t_sequence_irq_modes covers AUTO_RESTART, ONE_SHOT and CONTINOUS.

REQUIREMENT: Check asynchronous reset initializes timer state correctly
NOTES: Verified by reset_stress_t_test and by ABV checks for reset behavior.

REQUIREMENT: Check reset behavior during active timer operation
NOTES: The reset stress sequence toggles active and inactive reset while the timer is running.

REQUIREMENT: Check write/read access to cnt_reg
NOTES: Verified by write/read accesses and by the CNT read/write mix sequence.

REQUIREMENT: Check write/read access to cmp_reg
NOTES: Verified by setup sequences and by reading all timer registers.

REQUIREMENT: Check write/read access to ctrl_reg
NOTES: Mode tests write ctrl_reg for all supported modes.

REQUIREMENT: Check reads from cycle_cnt low and high registers
NOTES: timer_t_sequence_read_all reads both TIMER_CYCLE_L and TIMER_CYCLE_H.

REQUIREMENT: Check writes to cycle_cnt registers are acknowledged but do not corrupt timer state
NOTES: Covered by full_cov_t_test register accesses and checked by the scoreboard.

REQUIREMENT: Check CP_REQ_NONE returns CP_RSP_IDLE
NOTES: Run sequences use CP_REQ_NONE and ABV checks the IDLE response.

REQUIREMENT: Check valid aligned read returns CP_RSP_ACK
NOTES: Reads from all available registers are covered by full_access_t_test.

REQUIREMENT: Check valid aligned write returns CP_RSP_ACK
NOTES: Register writes are covered by the basic and coverage-oriented tests.

REQUIREMENT: Check CP_REQ_RESERVED returns CP_RSP_ERROR
NOTES: timer_t_sequence_reserved targets the RESERVED request.

REQUIREMENT: Check address outside timer address space returns CP_RSP_OOR
NOTES: timer_t_sequence_invalid_addr targets an address outside the timer address space.

REQUIREMENT: Check unaligned address returns CP_RSP_UNALIGNED
NOTES: Unaligned addresses are covered by random constraints and coverage scenarios.

REQUIREMENT: Check unused aligned address inside timer address space is handled without DUT/GM mismatch
NOTES: addr_bus_branch_cover_t_test was added to hit the last uncovered branch in the address decoder.

REQUIREMENT: Check CP_RSP_WAIT is never generated
NOTES: ABV checks that the WAIT response is never generated.

REQUIREMENT: Check P_IRQ is asserted when cnt_reg reaches cmp_reg in AUTO_RESTART
NOTES: Verified by the directed AUTO_RESTART mode test and by the scoreboard.

REQUIREMENT: Check P_IRQ is asserted when cnt_reg reaches cmp_reg in ONE_SHOT
NOTES: Verified by the directed ONE_SHOT mode test and by the scoreboard.

REQUIREMENT: Check P_IRQ is asserted when cnt_reg reaches cmp_reg in CONTINOUS
NOTES: Verified by the directed CONTINOUS mode test and by the scoreboard.

REQUIREMENT: Check P_IRQ is not generated when timer is DISABLED
NOTES: Verified by disabled_t_test.

REQUIREMENT: Cover all functional coverpoints and crosses used for evaluated coverage
NOTES: Mode, IRQ, address, request and cross coverage are covered by the coverage-oriented sequences.

REQUIREMENT: Cover statements, branches, conditions and assertions in RTL
NOTES: The latest coverage report shows 100% assertions, branches, conditions and statements for top/HDL_DUT_U.

REQUIREMENT: Check constrained random distribution over reset, address, request and data fields
NOTES: Weights are configured in timer_t_sequence_rand according to the project assignment.

REQUIREMENT: Check RTL response decode does not update internal state on invalid accesses
NOTES: Regression requirement after timer_fvs.vhd fixes; the scoreboard reports no mismatch.

REQUIREMENT: Check register model frontdoor access through timer_reg_seq and bus adapter
NOTES: reg_t_test uses m_timer_reg_block and timer_reg_seq through the same bus sequencer and is included in the current regression list.

REQUIREMENT: Check formal/assertion oriented stress scenario for OOR, UNALIGNED, RESERVED, write-read and IRQ modes
NOTES: formal_t_test is included in the current regression list and targets assertion/formal-oriented stress scenarios.

REQUIREMENT: Check simple helper sequence over reset and all mode set sequences
NOTES: muj_prvni_t_test is included in the current regression list as a helper test over reset and mode-setting sequences.

REQUIREMENT: Check legacy misspelled continuous test alias maps to continuous_t_test
NOTES: continous_t_test inherits from continuous_t_test for naming compatibility and is included in the current regression list.
